ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( ISBLANK(Booking_Date__c), ISBLANK(Expected_Delivery_Date__c), Expected_Delivery_Date__c < Booking_Date__c, Expected_Delivery_Date__c > Booking_Date__c + 90 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Both booking and delivery dates are required. Delivery must be within 90 days of booking date.
